---
title: "Players"
description: "MLB hitter and pitcher leaderboards with context and reliability."
---

::: {.page-intro}
<span class="eyebrow">Player intelligence</span>

# Performance with context

Season results, quality of contact, run value, and sample reliability in one reporting layer.
:::

{{< include includes/player-leaders.html >}}

::: {.section-action}
[See the largest handedness matchup edges](matchups.qmd){.btn .btn-metallic}
:::
